ignoreCommand: git diff --name-only HEAD^ HEAD | grep -qvE '\.md$|\.txt$|\.json$|\.yaml$|\.yml$' && echo 'build' || echo 'skip'
buildCommand: if cd flutter; then git pull && cd .. ; else git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 -b stable; fi && flutter/bin/flutter doctor && flutter/bin/flutter clean && flutter/bin/flutter config --enable-web && flutter/bin/flutter build web --release
